Package org.apache.gravitino.utils.jdbc

  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    JdbcDataSourceConfig
    Immutable JDBC DataSource settings used to create a pooled BasicDataSource.
    JdbcDataSourceFactory
    Utility for creating a pooled JDBC BasicDataSource.
    JdbcSqlScriptUtils
    Utility methods for parsing and executing SQL scripts.
